name: Get Call Stats for all OpCos

content.query:
SELECT 
cls.[OperatingCompany]
,cty.[CallType]
,clr.[CallResult]
,clr.Connected
,count([CallID]) as CallCount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_CALL] cls
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CALL_TYPE] cty
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CALL_RESULT] clr
 WHERE
 cls.CallTypeID = cty.CallTypeID
 and cls.CallResultID = clr.CallResultID
 group BY
cls.[OperatingCompany]
,cty.[CallType]
,clr.[CallResult]
,clr.Connected
order by
cls.[OperatingCompany]
,cty.[CallType]
,clr.[CallResult]
